title: Racosperma tarculense
taxonomy: Racosperma tarculense is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. It is a type of shrub native to Australia. The genus Racosperma has undergone reclassification, and some sources place the species within the genus Acacia. Further study is necessary to determine the most accurate classification for Racosperma tarculense.
